name: golang-github-cli-browser-dev
title: golang-github-cli-browser-dev
summary: helpers to open URLs, files, or readers in a web browser (Go library)
description:
helpers to open URLs, files, or readers in a web browser (Go library)
The browser package provides helpers to open URLs, readers, or files
in the system default web browser.
.
This fork from github.com/pkg/browser adds:
- `OpenReader` error wrapping;
- `ErrNotFound` error wrapping on BSD;
- Go 1.21 support.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-cli-browser-dev because helpers to open URLs, files, or readers in a web browser (Go library).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-cli-browser-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-cli-browser-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-cli-browser-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
